systemAnalysis.systemImpact: This is an additive change. A new N8N workflow will be created, but it will not impact the currently running system until it is manually imported and activated in the N8N instance. No existing services will be modified.

executionSteps.description: Create the N8N workflow JSON file that defines the email generation process. This file represents the workflow to be imported into N8N.

files.change: A new file containing the JSON definition of the N8N workflow. It includes a webhook trigger, logic to route contacts, a node to call the Claude API for email generation, and a node to save the generated email as a draft in Mautic. The Claude API call uses a placeholder `{{$credentials.claudeApiKey.apiKey}}` which should be configured in the N8N credential manager.

executionSteps.description: Create a markdown document explaining how to import and configure the new workflow in N8N.

files.change: Create a new documentation file with instructions for importing the `n8n_claude_email_workflow.json` into N8N, setting up the necessary 'claudeApiKey' credentials, and activating the workflow.

rollbackPlan: The execution of this plan only creates new files.
To roll back, delete the created files: `rm n8n_claude_email_workflow.json US-006_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md`
